steps.title: Interpret the line
steps.content: The line on the graph represents all (tangerine, lemon) pound-combinations that total \$18. Each point $(x, y)$ on the line gives the pounds of lemons $y$ that pair with $x$ pounds of tangerines.

steps.title: Read the line at x = 4
steps.content: Locate $x = 4$ on the horizontal axis and trace up to the line: the corresponding $y$-value is $10$. So 4 pounds of tangerines pair with 10 pounds of lemons. That matches choice B — B is correct.
